myth_text_en: Vaccines cause infertility in women.
correct_text_en: Vaccines are rigorously tested and do not affect fertility.
correct_text_lg: Enkingo tezikosa kubeera n'abaana.

myth_text_en: Vaccines contain microchips.
correct_text_en: Vaccines contain no microchips.
correct_text_lg: Enkingo tezirimu chip.

myth_text_en: Only sick children need vaccines.
correct_text_en: Fact: Routine immunization prevents deadly diseases like Polio, Measles, and TB before they occur.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okugemba bulijjo kuziyiza endwadde nnyingi nga mumpumpu n'olukusu.

myth_text_en: HIV is caused by witchcraft.
correct_text_en: HIV is caused by a virus transmitted through fluids. It is managed by ART.
correct_text_lg: HIV ereetera omukutu gwa HIV, si obulogo. Eddagala lya ART liyamba.

myth_text_en: There is no medicine to prevent HIV after exposure.
correct_text_en: Fact: PrEP and PEP are medicines that can prevent HIV infection if taken as directed by a health worker.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Waliwo eddagala (PrEP/PEP) eriziyiza HIV ssinga okikozesa mu ddwaliro.

myth_text_en: Eating sugarcane or too much sun causes malaria.
correct_text_en: Fact: Malaria (Omusujja gw'ensiri) is only caused by the bite of an infected female Anopheles mosquito.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Omusujja gw'ensiri gureetebwa nsiri, si ebikajjo oba musana.

myth_text_en: Sleeping under a net makes you feel too hot and isn't necessary.
correct_text_en: Fact: Sleeping under a Long-Lasting Insecticide-Treated Net (LLIN) is the most effective way to prevent malaria.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okusula mu katimba k'ensiri akalimu eddagala kwekuziyiza omusujja gw'ensiri okusinga.

myth_text_en: Hospital delivery is dangerous.
correct_text_en: Skilled health facility deliveries are safer and prevent maternal death.
correct_text_lg: Okuzaala mu ddwaliro kusinga okukuuma omukazi n'omwana.

myth_text_en: You only need to visit the clinic once during pregnancy.
correct_text_en: Fact: At least 8 ANC visits are recommended to monitor the health of both mother and baby and prevent complications.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Omukazi alina okukeberebwa emirundi munaana (8) ng'ali lubuto okuziyiza obuzibu.

myth_text_en: Drinking hot water kills COVID-19.
correct_text_en: High temperatures don't kill the virus inside the body and can cause burns.
correct_text_lg: Okunywa ebyokulya ebyokya tekutuuka mu mawuggwe gye kawangaalira.

myth_text_en: COVID-19 is a spiritual curse or caused by 5G.
correct_text_en: Fact: COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus, which spreads through respiratory droplets.
correct_text_lg: Fact: COVID-19 ereetebwa kawuka (virus), si mpewo za 5G oba bulogo.

myth_text_en: Eating mangoes causes malaria.
correct_text_en: Malaria is caused by mosquito bites, not fruit.
correct_text_lg: Okulya emmiyembe tekuleta musujja gw'ensiri.

myth_text_en: Malnutrition only happens to poor families.
correct_text_en: Fact: Malnutrition can happen to anyone. A balanced diet with proteins, carbs, and vitamins prevents stunting.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Endiisa ennungi eyetaagibwa buli muntu okuziyiza okukula obubi.

myth_text_en: Ebola is a curse from spirits.
correct_text_en: Ebola is a viral disease spread by contact with body fluids. It is not spiritual.
correct_text_lg: Ebola esaasaanyizibwa mu kukwata ku mazzi g'omubiri, si mu mpewo.

myth_text_en: Cholera is caused by eating too much food.
correct_text_en: Fact: Cholera is caused by the Vibrio cholerae bacteria, often found in water or food contaminated with feces.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Cholera ava ku buwuka mu mazzi amacaafu oba emmere erimu obubi.

myth_text_en: STDs are caused by sitting on dirty latrines.
correct_text_en: Fact: STIs are primarily caused by bacteria, viruses, or parasites transmitted through unprotected sexual contact.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Endwadde z'ekikaba ziva mu kwegatta okutali kukuume, si kuteekebwa ku kabuyonjo.

myth_text_en: Condoms are not effective and contain holes.
correct_text_en: Fact: Consistent and correct use of condoms is highly effective in preventing STIs and HIV.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okukozesa obulungi kondomu kuziyiza endwadde z'ekikaba n'akawuka ka HIV.

myth_text_en: Syphilis is a natural stage of growing up for men.
correct_text_en: Fact: Syphilis is a serious bacterial infection (Treponema pallidum) that requires medical treatment to prevent organ damage.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Syphilis lulwadde lwa buwuka obubi era lwetaaga eddagala ly'omu ddwaliro.

myth_text_en: Malaria is caused by general mosquitoes.
correct_text_en: Fact: Malaria is specifically caused by the Plasmodium parasite transmitted by the female Anopheles mosquito.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Omusujja gw'ensiri guvva ku kawuka ka Plasmodium akasaasaanyizibwa ensiri ya Anopheles.

myth_text_en: Male circumcision has no health benefits.
correct_text_en: Fact: Voluntary Medical Male Circumcision (VMMC) reduces the risk of female-to-male HIV transmission by approximately 60%.
correct_text_lg: Fact: Okukomola abasajja mu ddwaliro kukendeeza akatyabaga k'okufuna HIV n'ebitundu 60%.
